title: limeum pauciflorum
intro: Limeum pauciflorum, also known as the Limeum or False Lime, is a plant species that belongs to the family Limoniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help soothe and calm irritated tissues. The health benefits of Limeum pauciflorum include reducing inflammation, alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
